race.description: Sebring Sun At Glenthorne Park Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: EVIL LOVER (9) impressed first-up at Armidale then raced wide and kept finding to finish fourth last start on a heavy track over 1205m here. Won't mind coming back in trip and gets in well under today's scale. In the right race to bounce back to the winner's list. LORD SEYMOUR (4) won his maiden here over 800m when fresh from a spell two runs ago. Less impressive at Inverell last time on a firmer surface. Seems to enjoy getting the toe in so give him another chance. SOOBOOCO (2) doesn't win out of turn but his recent efforts have been sound. Two of his three wins have come on heavy tracks. Nicely drawn and looks sure to be about the cash again. SINGLE TOUCH (1) is edging his way towards another win. Battled on gamely for a close fourth most recently over this trip at Taree in heavy conditions. Big class drop today which brings him right into discussions. HOMELAND (12) handled the bottomless track at Taree okay last start, his first in five weeks. One for the exotics.
